events.event_description: U.S. established a liaison-level presence in the Marshall Islands, with Samuel B. Thomsen serving as Representative.

evidence.quote: Samuel B Thomsen, Representative. Appointed: 1987-06-15. Credentials presented: 1987-07-11. Left post on 1990-07-11.

events.event_description: U.S. elevated its mission to embassy level in the Marshall Islands, with William Jr. Bodde presenting credentials as the first Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary.

evidence.quote: William Jr Bodde, Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary. Appointed: 1990-06-27. Credentials presented: 1990-08-06. Left post on 1992-06-28.
